author: Susan "Lady D" Damon
release_boundary: Line-edited review batch. This is not final KDP upload approval.

source_files.library_source: /Users/IDC2.5/Documents/LADY D/Production Library/01 Surrendering to God's Love/01 Manuscript/Month 02 - February/Days 053-059 Manuscript.md

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Let Love Teach the Father's Patience into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Let patient trust interrupt one fear-driven hurry today; the Father still knows how to part waters.
edits.reason: Keeps the Red Sea power and patience lens concrete without pressuring the reader to force timing.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Awaken Love Stronger Than Fear into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Answer one holy call with reverence today; love can help fear bow without running.
edits.reason: Preserves Sinai reverence while keeping fear under the Father's loving call.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Embrace Restoring Compassion into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Bring one tangled piece of your story to the Father; compassion can speak a truer name.
edits.reason: Connects restoring compassion to real history and identity without requiring a clean past.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Remember the Promise That Holds into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Set God's word before the loudest voice today, then let obedience answer love.
edits.reason: Keeps commandment-keeping as covenant response to grace, not a way to earn love.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Walk in the Heart That Calls You into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Choose one truthful act of honor today, with mercy intact and safety still guarded.
edits.reason: Preserves the family-honor commandment while keeping abuse and safety guardrails explicit.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Let Peace Lead Love That Sends You into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Pause at worship before responsibility today; the Father's presence can send you from peace.
edits.reason: Turns the altar/presence lens into a practical worship-before-work movement.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Choose Covenant Mercy into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Name one rival allegiance today, and let covenant mercy call your heart home.
edits.reason: Keeps the idolatry warning reverent while refusing shame-based fatalism.

judge_auditor_loops.evidence: All 7 impact lines now vary by entry theme and avoid the repeated `Let the Father's love carry` frame.
Sabbath remains seventh-day/Saturday; commandment-keeping and obedience stay framed as response to grace.
The batch file now has zero old Volume 1 morning-impact templates.
Repo source, public mirror, and Production Library manuscript receive the same edited text.

next_loop: Continue author-voice line edits in seven-day or month-close batches, then regenerate masters/interiors and update the review site after each meaningful gate.
